thread.title: Trump is coming and so are good times in America, according to Michael Letts
thread.title_full: Trump is coming and so are good times in America, according to Michael Letts

author: lawenforcementtoday.com
title: Trump is coming and so are good times in America, according to Michael Letts
text:
WASHINGTON, D.C. - Americans watched with great anticipation as the results of the American presidency trickled in on election day. The sickening thought of another four years of a liberal agenda with Kamala Harris and her odd pick of Tim Walz was deeply concerning.
Conversely, the thought of Donald Trump in the White House brought a lot of hope and optimism for the future of America – if he won.
Now election day has come and gone, and America has spoken and made her choice, the right choice, in Donald Trump.
We can all breathe a collective sigh of relief now that we won’t be forced into a spiraling and out-of-control liberal agenda that had men in women’s sports, gender mutilation in children and transgender parades for kids.
And that is just in America. The international community seems to have a new level of optimism for the future of our world (except maybe China, North Korea, and Iran, just to name a few).
And Michael Letts, CEO and founder of the nonprofit InVest USA which provides vests for LEOs and first responders, knows this more than most.
“America can help restore freedom and liberty to what we have lost in our country. America is viewed as a beacon of hope, freedom and justice. And we lost that, but we’re here to gain it back, and I tell them [the international community] help is on the way,” Letts said in a recent
He continued, “We [America] have always had compassion in wanting people to experience the freedom that we here in this country have. So, you can be rest assured we will be supporting policies that help free the world of tyranny.”
One of the main issues with Joe Biden in the last four years was his inability to command respect from the international community. This was clearly worsened after the disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan that led to losing thirteen US servicemembers and wounding another forty-five.
There is speculation from political analysts across the country that the Afghanistan withdrawal proved Biden’s lack of leadership (again) and showed his complete incompetence. And that ultimately led to increased international instability as seen in the Ukraine invasion and the conflicts in the Middle East.
That was why another four years of liberal policies led by the inexperienced Harris would have been disastrous. Thankfully that was avoided.
And it all started with the election process.
“Here’s what happened on the night of the election. The results begin to come in. And we had said all along that, look, part of the key of a new administration would be determining national security. And part of national security is election integrity. You don’t have national security if you can’t protect your elections,” Letts said.
He continued, “Quite frankly folks, if you can’t protect your elections, anybody can be put up and used and manipulated to win. I mean you can put a communist up and they can win and gut what’s left of this country.”
For a moment that’s what seemed possible. Thankfully, the election process was protected, a true form of Democracy and Harris and Walz didn’t win.
Donald Trump in office is the geater justice for America - and the world.
Michael Letts is the author of Truth, Lies and Control: Finding Hope in an Upside-Down World. Preorder your copy on
To learn more about Michael Letts, go to
